If you would like to share your study with others, please send a private message (EN, RU, DE) to user {link} with the link to your study. To be included, your study must be interesting, public, and cloning must be allowed. Your study will be cloned, and you will be added as a contributor so that you can continue to participate in the study at any time.

authModal.title: Lichess Study Access Required
authModal.description: To synchronize your studies directly with Lichess, this application requires permission to read and write to your Lichess studies.

whyList: Import and edit PGN chapters in your studies
Create new studies on your behalf

sidebar.deleteChapterContent: This chapter is published on Lichess. Deleting it will permanently remove it from both your local device and Lichess. Are you sure you want to proceed?

sidebar.syncConfirmContent: All local changes for this study that haven't been pushed to Lichess will be permanently lost. The local data will be completely replaced with the current state from Lichess. Do you want to proceed?

bonusInfo.title: 🎉 xtrapawn Bonus Program
bonusInfo.p1: Our bonus program rewards the most active members of the xtrapawn club on Lichess.
bonusInfo.p2: Bonuses are assigned automatically. The calculation is done daily at 05:29 AM (UTC+1) based on performance over the last 30 days.
bonusInfo.p4a: Players with Vector 500+ receive Bishop (750 PawnCoins).
bonusInfo.p4b: Players with Vector 250+ receive Knight (500 PawnCoins).
bonusInfo.p5: Status is updated daily and remains valid until the next calculation.
bonusInfo.alertText: Prefer to earn instead of buy? Check out our
bonusInfo.p6: Status calculation is rolling over the last 30 days.
bonusInfo.p7: Subject to changes in the bonus program.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.precedence: This translation is provided for information purposes only. In the event of any discrepancies or conflicts between this English version and the German original, the German version shall prevail and be legally binding.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.subtitle: Information according to § 5 DDG
imprint.name: Sergej Siemens, M.Eng.
imprint.vatId: Value Added Tax Identification Number according to § 27 a of the Value Added Tax Act: DE366185109
imprint.disputeRefusal: Consumer dispute resolution: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.liabilityContent: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content according to general laws (§ 7 Para. 1 DDG). There is no obligation to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information (§§ 8-10 DDG). Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will immediately remove corresponding content or links to external third-party websites. No liability is assumed for external content.
imprint.copyrightContent: The content created by us on these pages is subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require written consent. Downloads and copies are only permitted for private use.

introParagraphs: The protection of your personal data is an important concern for us. We follow the 'Privacy by Design' approach: We only process data that is technically absolutely necessary for the operation of the app.
Controller within the meaning of the GDPR:
logfilesParagraphs: Each time the website is accessed, our system automatically collects data and information from the computer system of the accessing computer. The following data is collected:
Legal basis: Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR (Legitimate Interest). Storage serves IT security and the defense against attack attempts. Logfiles are automatically deleted after a maximum of 14 days.
hostingParagraphs: Our app is hosted on servers of netcup GmbH (Karlsruhe, Germany). We have concluded an order processing agreement (AVV) with the provider in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR to ensure that your data is processed strictly according to our instructions and in compliance with the GDPR.
lichessParagraphs: You can log in to EXTRAPAWN via your Lichess account using the OAuth 2.0 procedure.
Process: You will be redirected to Lichess and authorize access there.
Data: We receive your username from Lichess and link it to your EXTRAPAWN profile.
Purpose: Provision of core functions (analysis of your games).
Legal basis: Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR (Contract Fulfillment).
paymentParagraphs: For the conclusion of subscriptions, we use the services of Polar.sh and Stripe.

Processing: When you upgrade, your payment data is collected and processed directly by Polar/Stripe. We do not store credit card data on our own servers at any time. For more information on data processing, please refer to the Polar.sh privacy policy:
storageParagraphs: EXTRAPAWN does not use marketing cookies. We only use the 'Local Storage' of your browser to store technically necessary settings:
Login status (Auth-Token): To keep you logged in.
Language settings (i18n): So the app appears in your preferred language.
UI settings: e.g., your chosen board design.
Legal basis: Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR. This data is strictly necessary for the operation of the app; consent (cookie banner) is therefore not required.
fontsParagraphs: Fonts: We do not use external services like Google Fonts. All fonts (e.g., Ubuntu) are served locally from our own servers.
Tracking: We do not use analysis tools (like Google Analytics) or marketing pixels.
rightsParagraphs: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Right to rectification or erasure (Art. 16/17 GDPR)
Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
You also have the right to complain to a data protection supervisory authority about the processing of your personal data by us.

introParagraphs:
These T&C apply to the use of the platform EXTRAPAWN, operated by:

**Sergej Siemens, M.Eng.**
Schuhbauerstraße 19
84166 Adlkofen, Germany
E-Mail: immozerai{'@'}gmail.com

(hereinafter "Provider")
sections.subjectTitle: 2. Subject Matter and Description of Services
subjectParagraphs: (1) EXTRAPAWN is an analysis and training platform for chess players. The platform is operated on a freemium model.
(2) Free basic version: Users can use basic functions free of charge. There is no claim to the permanent availability of these functions.

(3) Paid subscription (Pro): The paid main service includes access to advanced training modules, in particular an extensive database for tactical puzzles and endgame training (theoretical and practical nature).

(4) Additional functions (statistics/AI): The provider provides graphical analyses, statistics, and AI-supported evaluations as part of the subscription. These functions are expressly voluntary additional services and are not part of the guaranteed quality of the Pro version. The provider reserves the right to change, expand, or remove these functions at any time as part of technical development.
sections.contractTitle: 3. Conclusion of Contract and Payment Processing
contractParagraphs: (1) Subscriptions are purchased via Polar Signals AB (Polar.sh) as the Merchant of Record. Sales, billing, and all associated statutory information obligations – including instructions on withdrawal and consumer protection information – are handled entirely by Polar.sh as part of the checkout process. The terms of sale of Polar.sh apply additionally.
(2) The contract for the subscription is concluded as soon as the user has successfully completed the payment process at Polar.sh.
(3) Prior express consent to these T&C by activating the corresponding checkbox is required before purchase. No purchase is possible without this consent.
terminationParagraphs: (2) Termination is possible at any time without notice to the end of the paid period.
(3) After termination, the Pro functions remain fully available until the end of the already paid period. No refund of amounts already paid will be made.
dataParagraphs: Game statistics, analyses, and AI evaluations are platform data calculated and held by the provider. The provider reserves the right to change, reset, or delete this data at any time as part of further development. This does not give rise to any claims by the user. The user's original game data remains exclusively with Lichess; the user is responsible for backing up this data themselves.
liabilityParagraphs: (1) The provider is liable without limitation in the event of intent or gross negligence and for injury to life, limb, or health.

(2) In the case of slight negligence, the provider is only liable for the breach of an essential contractual obligation (cardinal obligation). In this case, liability is limited to the typical damage foreseeable at the time the contract was concluded.
sections.changesTitle: 7. Changes to the Platform and the T&C
changesParagraphs: The provider is entitled to adapt the platform as part of technical improvement and development. The user will be informed of significant changes to the T&C in good time.
lawParagraphs: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies. In relation to consumers, this only applies insofar as no mandatory provisions of the law of the state in which the consumer has their habitual residence conflict.
finalParagraphs: Should individual provisions of these T&C be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected.

login.welcomeText: Your ultimate laboratory for chess training and deep analysis. Log in via Lichess to access all professional features.

hero.title: ExtraPawn — The Chess Gym for Serious Players
hero.subtitle: A complete preparation ecosystem for tournament players (1500+)

what.title: What is it?
what.text: **ExtraPawn** is a professional training environment where every module flows logically into the next. Not just a place for puzzles, but a full-fledged gym designed to bridge the gap between amateur play and Grandmaster-level preparation.

forWho.title: For Whom?
forWho.text: For those stuck on a plateau who want real progress. ExtraPawn doesn't teach the basic rules — it digitizes your weaknesses and eliminates them systematically.

uniqueness.title: What makes us unique?
uniqueness.text: The market is flooded with disconnected tools. ExtraPawn combines everything into a **single closed-loop training cycle**: Build your repertoire → Test it in sparring → Hone the realization → Analyze weaknesses → Fix. All modules sync progress in one unified dashboard.

study.title: STUDY — Analytical Laboratory
study.text: An interactive tool for building and **actively memorizing** your opening repertoire. 1-click generator based on elite statistics (MozerBook), visual trees, and hardcore training modes like Speedrun and Reply Training. Full Lichess Study synchronization.

openingSparring.title: OPENING SPARRING — Opening Simulator
openingSparring.text: Simulate real tournament openings. Our bot moves based on live player statistics (Lichess 1000–2200+) with adjustable variability. Choose between Master, Hustler, or Swindler personalities. Follow up with realization training against Maia AI.

diamondHunter.title: DIAMOND HUNTER — Brilliancy Trainer
diamondHunter.text: Learn to punish typical mistakes. A two-phase system: hunt with hints until the blunder, then mandatory reproduction of the entire line from memory. Turn opponent errors into your learned victories.

tornado.title: TORNADO — Tactical Storm
tornado.text: Adaptive tactical trainer based on Glicko-2. No error limits, no boring warm-ups — high-level difficulty from the first minute. 15 thematic vectors and a dedicated mode for fixing your mistakes.

finishHim.title: FINISH HIM — Art of Realization
finishHim.text: Two-phase trainer: first a tactical strike, then mandatory realization of the advantage against human-like Maia AI (1900-2400). Master the skill of coldly finishing off won positions.

practicalChess.title: PRACTICAL CHESS — Game Scenarios
practicalChess.text: Real game positions with an advantage against stubborn Maia. Features exclusive modes: **ExtraPawn** for converting extra material and **Black or White** for training positional intuition. Play to win.

theoreticalEndings.title: THEORETICAL ENDINGS — Book Master
theoreticalEndings.text: A testing ground for classic book endings. Our provocateur engine tricks and sets traps even in drawn positions. Train for both the win and the save with a dedicated endgame rating.

userCabinet.title: USER CABINET — Command Center
userCabinet.text: Your interactive mission control. Rose Charts visualize your technical DNA across all themes. Launch targeted training for your weak spots with one click. Manage subscriptions and track your progress.

techStack.title: Advanced Tech Stack
techStack.frontendStack: Vue 3.5 (Composition API), Vite, Pinia, Naive UI

about.contributing: We welcome all contributions to make EXTRAPAWN the ultimate training tool! If you have ideas or found a bug, please create an issue or a PR on GitHub.

licenseAndAcknowledgements.title: Licensing & Acknowledgements
licenseAndAcknowledgements.gplIntro: This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0, promoting transparency and community growth.

stockfish.title: Stockfish 18
stockfish.text1: Analysis and truth-seeking are powered by
stockfish.text2: , the world's strongest open-source chess engine.
stockfish.gplNote: In accordance with the GPLv3, our source code is open and available for the benefit of the global chess community.
stockfish.projectSourceCode: Source Code: Repository public on GitHub
stockfish.gratitude: Deepest gratitude to the Stockfish team for defining the standard of chess evaluation.

maia.title: Maia Chess
maia.text: Realistic sparring is provided by **Maia Chess** weights. These neural networks are trained on millions of games to predict moves that feel human, not mechanical. Special thanks to the CSSLab for these incredible weights.

lcZero.title: Leela Chess Zero (LCZero)
lcZero.text: Our neural engine layer runs on **LCZero**, the pioneering open-source engine that brought AI-driven chess to the masses. Respect to the LCZero community.

chessground.title: Chessground
chessground.text1: Board rendering is powered by the ultra-fast
chessground.gratitude: Thank you, Lichess, for the best board renderer in the world.

chessops.title: Chessops
chessops.text: Move generation, legality checks, and PGN/FEN parsing are handled by the modular **Chessops** library.
chessops.gratitude: A vital tool for any modern chess application.

credits.lichess: Lichess.org - For the API, puzzle DB, and evaluation sets.
credits.n8n: n8n.io - The flexible nervous system of our backend orchestration.
credits.community: All contributors and testers who help refine the dream of perfect training.

author.title: The Mission & The Maker
author.bioPart1: I'm Moser, a mechanical engineer and lifelong chess student. Born in Kazakhstan (1985), living in Germany (2003).
author.bioPart2: EXTRAPAWN is my dream of a professional tool that empowers players to study effectively, which only became possible through modern AI and workflow automation.
author.bioPart3: Fluent in Russian and German, always polishing my English. Thank you for joining this journey!

about.footerNote: Built with ❤️ for those who seek chess mastery.

welcome.slogan: Consistency is the key to mastery.
welcome.loginPrompt: Or log in to access all features:
